name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan

draft.notes: 9 non-DFC commons + 1 double-faced common-or-uncommon + 3 non-DFC uncommons + 1 rare + 1 land + ad/placeholder card. The land is a basic land or one of 7 common cave lands. If a foil appears it comes after the rare and displaces a common (becomes 8 non-DFC commons).

statedRates: Foil 1:45 cards. Cards with showcase/borderless treatment appear in common run C with ~1/3 of copies being the alternate treatment.
sourceNotes: Premier set: 5 DFC commons, 12 DFC uncommons, 11 DFC rares, 7 DFC mythics. Three variations of each basic land plus 7 extra common cave lands. The DFC slot draws from a combined run where the included card may be common or uncommon. Printed in USA, Japan, Belgium; US printing modeled. 36 packs per box.
skipReason: Superseded by a hand-authored recipe derived from the official Wizards 'Collecting' article (more accurate odds + full product lineup). The generator must NOT overwrite data/booster-contents/lci.json.
